title: Platform Service
description: Runtime environment detection and application chrome utilities: device/browser/screen checks, dark/light theme management with persistence, global resize/click/scroll/direction events, and SSR-safe isBrowser() helpers.
imports: import { AXPlatform, AXThemeMode, AXPlatformEvent, isBrowser, isServer, PLATFORMS_MAP } from '@acorex/core/platform';

hints.title: Bootstrap theme on startup
hints.content: Call autoDetectThemeMode() once after the app renders (e.g. in afterNextRender) to restore the user's saved preference from localStorage key AX_THEME_MODE.

hints.title: SM breakpoint = mobile UI
hints.content: Throughout AcoreX, platform.is('SM') is used as the mobile breakpoint (max-width 640px) for full-screen popups, action sheets, and responsive layouts.

hints.title: SSR-safe guards
hints.content: Use isBrowser() before accessing window, localStorage, or DOM APIs. platform.is() returns false on the server.

hints.title: Dark mode CSS class
hints.content: Theme switching toggles the ax-dark class on the <html> element. Ensure your design tokens respond to this class.

types.title: AXPlatform
types.description: Root injectable for platform detection, theme mode, and global DOM events.

props.name: themeMode
props.description: Current theme mode as an Angular signal.

props.name: themeMode$
props.description: RxJS stream of theme mode changes.

props.name: directionChange
props.description: Fires when html dir attribute changes (RTL/LTR).

props.name: screenSize
props.description: Current breakpoint keyword: SM | MD | LG | XL | 2XL | 3XL | 4XL | 5XL.

methods.content:
/**
 * True when html has ax-dark class.
 */
isDark(): boolean

/**
 * True when document direction is RTL.
 */
isRtl(): boolean

/**
 * True when innerHeight < innerWidth.
 */
isLandscape(): boolean

/**
 * Opposite of isLandscape(). Note: method name is isPortrate in source.
 */
isPortrate(): boolean

/**
 * Detect platform, browser, technology, or screen breakpoint.
 * Returns false on server.
 */
is(name: AXPlatforms | AXBrowsers | AXTechnologies | AXScreenSizes): boolean

/**
 * Apply light theme, remove ax-dark, persist to localStorage.
 */
switchLightMode(): 'light'

/**
 * Apply dark theme, add ax-dark, persist to localStorage.
 */
switchDarkMode(): 'dark'

/**
 * Follow OS prefers-color-scheme setting.
 */
switchSystemMode(): void

/**
 * Set theme explicitly: 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'.
 */
setThemeMode(mode: AXThemeMode): void

/**
 * Read AX_THEME_MODE from localStorage and apply.
 */
autoDetectThemeMode(): AXThemeMode

types.title: isBrowser / isServer
types.description: Standalone runtime environment checks (no injection required).

methods.content:
/**
 * Returns true when code runs in a browser window context.
 * Use before window, document, localStorage access.
 */
isBrowser(): boolean

/**
 * Returns true when code runs in a Node/server context.
 */
isServer(): boolean

content.data:
The @acorex/core/platform package centralizes environment detection and global UI behavior:

• AXPlatform — injectable service for theme mode, breakpoints, RTL/dark checks, and DOM event buses
• isBrowser() / isServer() — lightweight guards used across storage, network, and component code
• Standalone detector functions — isMobile, isIOS, isChrome, isPWA, etc. (also reachable via platform.is())

Components like overlays, popups, dropdowns, and the documentation layout use AXPlatform to adapt UI for mobile screens and theme changes.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: AXPlatform is providedIn root — inject it to restore theme mode, read responsive state, and react to global platform events.

sections.title: Theme Mode Switching
sections.description: Light, dark, and system themes with persistence.

sections.title: Global Event Subjects
sections.description: Subscribe to resize, click, scroll, and direction changes.

content.data:
Breakpoint keywords use max-width media queries:

| Keyword | Media query | Typical use |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| SM | max-width: 640px | Mobile layouts, full-screen dialogs |
| MD | max-width: 768px | Tablet portrait |
| LG | max-width: 1024px | Tablet / small laptop |
| XL | max-width: 1280px | Desktop |
| 2XL | max-width: 1536px | Large desktop |
| 3XL | max-width: 1920px | Full HD+ |
| 4XL | max-width: 2560px | Ultra-wide |
| 5XL | (fallback) | Larger than 4XL |

platform.screenSize returns the first matching keyword from SM upward, or '5XL' if none match.

Note: is('SM') being true means the viewport is at most 640px wide — the common "mobile" check in AcoreX.

sections.title: CSS Integration
sections.description: How theme and viewport integrate with styles.

content.data:
Theme:
• switchDarkMode() adds class ax-dark to <html>
• switchLightMode() removes ax-dark
• switchSystemMode() follows prefers-color-scheme: dark
• Preference stored in localStorage as AX_THEME_MODE

Viewport height:
• On resize, AXPlatform sets CSS variable --ax-vh to window.innerHeight / 100 + 'px'
• Use calc(var(--ax-vh) * 100) for full-height mobile layouts that avoid 100vh browser chrome issues

Design your SCSS/Tailwind dark tokens to respond to html.ax-dark.
